diff: The Data Submission Responsible Actor calculates the net deposits based on on-chain events and makes the data available through an API endpoint located at [https://info-sky.blockanalitica.com/api/v1/incentivized-pools/](https://info-sky.blockanalitica.com/api/v1/incentivized-pools/).

The Data Submission Responsible Actor calculates the net deposits based on on-chain events and makes the data available through an API endpoint located at [https://info-sky.blockanalitica.com/api/v1/incentivized-pools/](https://info-sky.blockanalitica.com/api/v1/incentivized-pools/).
